name: Respect
description: Learners show respect for others, ideas, and diversity

name: Integrity
description: Learners demonstrate honesty and ethical behavior

name: Responsibility
description: Learners take ownership of their actions and learning

name: Unity
description: Learners work together harmoniously and support each other

name: Peace
description: Learners promote peaceful coexistence and conflict resolution

name: Love
description: Learners show care and compassion for others

name: Patriotism
description: Learners appreciate and contribute to their nation
